title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tech Mahindra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tech Mahindra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!
